columns.extraction_plan: The total number of participants in the CHAARTED trial is 790. This is stated in the 'Patients and Methods' section on page 1: 'In this phase III study, 790 patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer were equally randomly assigned'. This is reiterated in the 'Results' section on page 2: 'Between July 2006 and December 2012, 790 eligible patients were enrolled (Fig 1)'. Figure 1 on page 2 shows 397 patients assigned to ADT plus docetaxel and 393 to ADT alone, totaling 790. Table 1 on page 3 also confirms these numbers under the 'Overall' subgroup.
